nasb.text: So just as the tares are gathered up and burned with fire, so shall it be at the end of the age.

esv.text: Just as the weeds are gathered and burned with fire, so will it be at the end of the age.

cnv.text: 稗子怎樣被拔掉用火焚燒，在這世代終結的時候，也是一樣。

ccb.text: “毒麦怎样被拔出来丢在火里烧，同样，在世界末日的时候，

csbs.text: 就像稗子被拔出来用火烧掉，在这世代的终结也将是这样。
